footer.tagline: Agricultural excellence at the heart of Ivory Coast.

home.title: Home — Palme Ivoire
home.subtitle:
Palme Ivoire is a leading agro-industrial company in Côte d'Ivoire, specializing in palm oil production and processing.

Since its establishment, our mission has been to contribute to the sustainable development of the palm oil sector while creating value for our partners, producers, and communities.

Through our expertise, modern facilities, and strong commitment to quality, we deliver products that meet both national and international standards. Social responsibility, industrial performance, and environmental sustainability are at the core of everything we do.

services.label: Our areas of activity
services.subtitle: From plantation to processing, we master the entire palm oil value chain.

items.title: Industrial processing
items.desc: Extraction and refining of crude palm oil in our modern processing units.

items.title: Producer partnership
items.desc: Support and guidance for local producers to strengthen the palm oil sector.

items.title: Sustainable development
items.desc: Commitment to responsible practices to preserve the environment and support communities.

about.label: Who we are
about.title: A company rooted in the Ivorian land
about.body: Founded with the vision of unlocking Ivory Coast's agricultural potential, Palme Ivoire has established itself as a key player in the palm oil sector. We combine ancestral know-how with modern technology to produce excellence in every drop, while caring for our environment and our communities.

items.title: Excellence
items.desc: Every litre of oil we produce meets the most stringent quality standards, from field to factory.

items.title: Sustainability
items.desc: Our agricultural and industrial practices are designed to preserve ecosystems and nourish future generations.

items.title: Solidarity
items.desc: We invest in local communities, supporting partner producers and rural economies across the region.

contact.label: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Have a project or a question? Our team is here to help.

gallery.title: Gallery — Palme Ivoire
gallery.subtitle: A glimpse into our plantations, processing facilities, and the communities we work with.
